ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content: [ ] Go see a local jump rope competition (or view one [online](https://www.youtube.com/live/n7q3ByKc7Jo?feature=share)).
[ ] Make up other exercises to go with the jump rope songs when inclement weather keeps you indoors. [Here](https://activeforlife.com/1-skipping-rope-8-fun-activities/) are a few ideas.
[ ] Try these Jump for the Moon activities from[ NASA](https://www.nasa.gov/sites/default/files/atoms/files/jumpforthemoon_-_student.pdf).
